requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Jordan
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——约旦无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——約旦無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Jordan does not operate a horizontal RoHS-type regulation restricting the 10 EU RoHS substances （Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr（VI）, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP） across all electrical and electronic equipment as a single binding instrument. There is no JSMO RoHS conformity certificate equivalent to the EU CE-RoHS pathway. Hazardous-substance control in Jordan is handled through general chemicals, environmental, and product-safety provisions rather than a dedicated EEE substance-restriction law, and any substance limits that apply tend to come via specific JS/GSO product standards or GSO technical regulations rather than a horizontal RoHS list. Exporters should treat substance restriction as governed by the applicable safety standard and any GSO-level requirement, and should confirm the current position with JSMO — do not assume an EU-style RoHS DoC is required, and do not assume there is no substance control at all.
summary.zh: 约旦未以单一约束性制度形式实行限制欧盟 RoHS 10 项物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）于所有电气电子设备的横向 RoHS 型法规。不存在相当于欧盟 CE-RoHS 路径的 JSMO RoHS 合格证书。约旦的有害物质管控通过一般化学品、环境及产品安全规定处理，而非专门的 EEE 物质限制法；任何适用的物质限值往往来自具体 JS/GSO 产品标准或 GSO 技术法规，而非横向 RoHS 清单。出口商应将物质限制视为受适用安全标准及任何 GSO 级要求管辖，并向 JSMO 确认现行立场——勿假设须出具欧盟式 RoHS 符合性声明，亦勿假设完全无物质管控。
summary.zht: 約旦未以單一約束性制度形式實行限制歐盟 RoHS 10 項物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）於所有電氣電子設備的橫向 RoHS 型法規。不存在相當於歐盟 CE-RoHS 路徑的 JSMO RoHS 合格證書。約旦的有害物質管控通過一般化學品、環境及產品安全規定處理，而非專門的 EEE 物質限制法；任何適用的物質限值往往來自具體 JS/GSO 產品標準或 GSO 技術法規，而非橫向 RoHS 清單。出口商應將物質限制視為受適用安全標準及任何 GSO 級要求管轄，並向 JSMO 確認現行立場——勿假設須出具歐盟式 RoHS 符合性聲明，亦勿假設完全無物質管控。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-type substance-restriction regulation for EEE in Jordan as of 2026 (substance control via general chemicals/environmental/product-safety provisions and specific JS/GSO product standards)
JSMO / GSO product-specific standards and technical regulations (verify any substance limits per product)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 （Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE）, covering the original 6 RoHS substances （Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr（VI）, PBB, PBDE） with the same thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 （SJ/T 11364-2014） requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label （orange for above-threshold / green for below-threshold） on EEE sold in China. As of 2026 the four phthalates added by EU 2015/863 are not yet in the CN mandatory list. China RoHS 2 is a disclosure regime rather than a market-access bar.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（超限为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。截至 2026 年，欧盟 2015/863 新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制清单。中国 RoHS 2 为披露制度而非市场准入门槛。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（超限為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。截至 2026 年，歐盟 2015/863 新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制清單。中國 RoHS 2 為披露制度而非市場准入門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Honest mapping: unlike the EU, Jordan has no horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime, so there is no Jordanian RoHS Declaration of Conformity or RoHS conformity certificate to obtain — and the EU concern about the four added phthalates not being in CN RoHS does not translate into a separate mandatory Jordanian test. The practical position is closer to China's: China at least mandates a disclosure label （SJ/T 11364） for the original 6 substances, whereas Jordan imposes no equivalent EEE-wide disclosure label for LED luminaires. This means substance restriction is NOT a major distinct Jordanian market-access gap for lighting today. However, exporters should not over-claim 'no obligation at all': specific substance limits can arise through the applicable JS/GSO safety standard or a GSO technical regulation, and buyers/specifiers may contractually require RoHS-style compliance. Confirm the current substance position with JSMO and the in-country importer; do not fabricate a Jordanian RoHS scheme that does not exist.
gap.zh: 诚实对照：与欧盟不同，约旦无横向 RoHS 物质限制制度，故无须取得约旦 RoHS 符合性声明或 RoHS 合格证书——欧盟关于四项新增邻苯二甲酸酯未纳入中国 RoHS 的关切，在约旦不转化为单独的强制检测。其实务立场更接近中国：中国至少对原 6 项物质强制披露标识（SJ/T 11364），而约旦对 LED 灯具无相当的 EEE 全域披露标识。这意味着物质限制目前不是约旦照明市场准入的主要独立差距。但出口商不应过度宣称"完全无义务"：具体物质限值可能通过适用 JS/GSO 安全标准或 GSO 技术法规产生，且买方/规范方可能在合同上要求 RoHS 式合规。请向 JSMO 及在地进口商确认现行物质立场；勿虚构不存在的约旦 RoHS 制度。
gap.zht: 誠實對照：與歐盟不同，約旦無橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度，故無須取得約旦 RoHS 符合性聲明或 RoHS 合格證書——歐盟關於四項新增鄰苯二甲酸酯未納入中國 RoHS 的關切，在約旦不轉化為單獨的強制檢測。其實務立場更接近中國：中國至少對原 6 項物質強制披露標識（SJ/T 11364），而約旦對 LED 燈具無相當的 EEE 全域披露標識。這意味著物質限制目前不是約旦照明市場准入的主要獨立差距。但出口商不應過度宣稱「完全無義務」：具體物質限值可能通過適用 JS/GSO 安全標準或 GSO 技術法規產生，且買方/規範方可能在合同上要求 RoHS 式合規。請向 JSMO 及在地進口商確認現行物質立場；勿虛構不存在的約旦 RoHS 制度。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Jordan has no horizontal RoHS-type EEE substance-restriction regime and no RoHS conformity certificate; substance limits, if any, arise via specific JS/GSO product standards or GSO technical regulations — verify per product with JSMO
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Honest mapping of EU RoHS to Jordan: Jordan has no horizontal RoHS-type substance-restriction regime and no RoHS conformity certificate, so there is no EU-style RoHS DoC step and no separate mandatory phthalate test for market access. Substance restriction is therefore not a major distinct Jordanian gap for LED lighting today — though specific JS/GSO standards, GSO technical regulations, or buyer contracts may still impose substance limits. Do not assume a Jordanian RoHS scheme exists; confirm the current substance position with JSMO and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 欧盟 RoHS 对约旦的诚实对照：约旦无横向 RoHS 型物质限制制度，亦无 RoHS 合格证书，故无欧盟式 RoHS 符合性声明步骤，市场准入也无单独强制的邻苯二甲酸酯检测。因此物质限制目前不是约旦 LED 照明的主要独立差距——尽管具体 JS/GSO 标准、GSO 技术法规或买方合同仍可能施加物质限值。勿假设存在约旦 RoHS 制度；请向 JSMO 及在地进口商确认现行物质立场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 歐盟 RoHS 對約旦的誠實對照：約旦無橫向 RoHS 型物質限制制度，亦無 RoHS 合格證書，故無歐盟式 RoHS 符合性聲明步驟，市場准入也無單獨強制的鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。因此物質限制目前不是約旦 LED 照明的主要獨立差距——儘管具體 JS/GSO 標準、GSO 技術法規或買方合同仍可能施加物質限值。勿假設存在約旦 RoHS 制度；請向 JSMO 及在地進口商確認現行物質立場。

requirement_topic.en: No REACH-Style SVHC Supply-Chain Notification Regime in Jordan
requirement_topic.zh: 约旦无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报制度
requirement_topic.zht: 約旦無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度

summary.en: Jordan does not operate a REACH-style horizontal regime requiring proactive supply-chain notification of Substances of Very High Concern （SVHC） in articles above 0.1% w/w, and there is no Jordanian equivalent of the ECHA Candidate List, the Article 33 communication duty, or the SCIP database. Chemicals management in Jordan is handled through general environmental, customs, and dangerous-goods controls rather than an articles-in-products SVHC notification system. For LED luminaires, there is therefore no mandatory ongoing SVHC tracking obligation tied to Jordanian market access. Exporters should still expect that EU-bound or multinational buyers may contractually require REACH-style declarations, and that hazardous chemical/transport rules apply to any battery, chemical, or dangerous component — but these are not a Jordanian SVHC notification regime. Confirm current chemical-control requirements with the relevant Jordanian authorities and the importer.
summary.zh: 约旦未实行 REACH 式横向制度，不要求对物品中超过 0.1%（质量分数）的高度关注物质（SVHC）主动进行供应链通报，且无相当于 ECHA 候选清单、第 33 条通报义务或 SCIP 数据库的约旦制度。约旦的化学品管理通过一般环境、海关及危险品管控处理，而非物品内 SVHC 通报系统。因此对 LED 灯具而言，无与约旦市场准入挂钩的强制持续性 SVHC 跟踪义务。出口商仍应预期面向欧盟或跨国买方可能在合同上要求 REACH 式声明，且对任何电池、化学品或危险组件适用危险化学品/运输规则——但这些并非约旦 SVHC 通报制度。请向约旦相关主管机关及进口商确认现行化学品管控要求。
summary.zht: 約旦未實行 REACH 式橫向制度，不要求對物品中超過 0.1%（質量分數）的高度關注物質（SVHC）主動進行供應鏈通報，且無相當於 ECHA 候選清單、第 33 條通報義務或 SCIP 數據庫的約旦制度。約旦的化學品管理通過一般環境、海關及危險品管控處理，而非物品內 SVHC 通報系統。因此對 LED 燈具而言，無與約旦市場准入掛鈎的強制持續性 SVHC 跟蹤義務。出口商仍應預期面向歐盟或跨國買方可能在合同上要求 REACH 式聲明，且對任何電池、化學品或危險組件適用危險化學品/運輸規則——但這些並非約旦 SVHC 通報制度。請向約旦相關主管機關及進口商確認現行化學品管控要求。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification regime (no ECHA Candidate List equivalent, no Article 33 duty, no SCIP database) in Jordan as of 2026
General Jordanian chemicals / environmental / customs / dangerous-goods controls (not an articles-in-products SVHC system)

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to the REACH SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification obligation. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 （2020） on new chemical substance environmental management registration and GB 30981-2020 hazardous-chemical classification/labelling rules. None create an obligation to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报义务的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年）新化学物质环境管理登记及 GB 30981-2020 危险化学品分类/标签规则。上述均未产生在物品中 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報義務的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年）新化學物質環境管理登記及 GB 30981-2020 危險化學品分類/標籤規則。上述均未產生在物品中 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Honest mapping: neither Jordan nor China imposes a REACH-style SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification duty, so the EU obligation does not translate into a Jordanian market-access requirement — this is a non-gap for Jordan in regulatory terms. The exporter's practical considerations are: （1） no ECHA Candidate List screening or SCIP registration is required for Jordanian market access; （2） however, multinational or EU-linked buyers purchasing through Jordan may still contractually demand REACH-style SVHC declarations, so maintaining a basic substance-screening capability is commercially prudent; （3） general dangerous-goods/chemical-transport rules still apply to shipments. Do not present a Jordanian SVHC regime as existing — it does not. Confirm any chemical-control conditions with the importer and Jordanian authorities.
gap.zh: 诚实对照：约旦与中国均不施加 REACH 式 SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报义务，故欧盟义务不转化为约旦市场准入要求——就法规而言这对约旦是非差距。出口商的实务考量为：（1）约旦市场准入无须 ECHA 候选清单筛查或 SCIP 注册；（2）但经约旦采购的跨国或与欧盟关联买方仍可能在合同上要求 REACH 式 SVHC 声明，故保持基本物质筛查能力在商业上审慎；（3）出货仍适用一般危险品/化学品运输规则。勿将约旦 SVHC 制度呈现为存在——其并不存在。请向进口商及约旦主管机关确认任何化学品管控条件。
gap.zht: 誠實對照：約旦與中國均不施加 REACH 式 SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報義務，故歐盟義務不轉化為約旦市場准入要求——就法規而言這對約旦是非差距。出口商的實務考量為：（1）約旦市場准入無須 ECHA 候選清單篩查或 SCIP 註冊；（2）但經約旦採購的跨國或與歐盟關聯買方仍可能在合同上要求 REACH 式 SVHC 聲明，故保持基本物質篩查能力在商業上審慎；（3）出貨仍適用一般危險品/化學品運輸規則。勿將約旦 SVHC 制度呈現為存在——其並不存在。請向進口商及約旦主管機關確認任何化學品管控條件。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Jordan has no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification regime, no Candidate List equivalent, and no SCIP database; not a market-access requirement for LED luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no supply-chain SVHC notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Honest mapping: Jordan has no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification regime, no Candidate List equivalent, and no SCIP database — matching China's position, where no equivalent exists either. SVHC notification is therefore not a Jordanian market-access requirement for LED luminaires. EU-linked or multinational buyers may still contractually request REACH-style declarations, and general chemical/dangerous-goods rules apply, but no Jordanian SVHC scheme should be assumed. Confirm chemical-control conditions with the importer and Jordanian authorities.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 诚实对照：约旦无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报制度、无候选清单对应物、无 SCIP 数据库——与中国立场一致，中国亦无对应制度。因此 SVHC 通报不是约旦 LED 灯具市场准入要求。与欧盟关联或跨国买方仍可能在合同上要求 REACH 式声明，且适用一般化学品/危险品规则，但不应假设存在约旦 SVHC 制度。请向进口商及约旦主管机关确认化学品管控条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 誠實對照：約旦無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度、無候選清單對應物、無 SCIP 數據庫——與中國立場一致，中國亦無對應制度。因此 SVHC 通報不是約旦 LED 燈具市場准入要求。與歐盟關聯或跨國買方仍可能在合同上要求 REACH 式聲明，且適用一般化學品/危險品規則，但不應假設存在約旦 SVHC 制度。請向進口商及約旦主管機關確認化學品管控條件。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Market-Access Process and Documentation vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体市场准入流程与文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體市場准入流程與文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: To place LED luminaires on the Jordanian market, the exporter （via a registered in-country importer） must assemble: （1） test evidence against the applicable JS/IEC safety standards （JS/IEC 60598-1 for luminaires; JS/IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps）; （2） EMC emissions evidence （CISPR 15-based）; （3） the energy-efficiency label per the JSMO labelling scheme; （4） photobiological assessment （JS/IEC 62471） where relevant; （5） TRC type approval for smart/wireless products. These are submitted for the JSMO conformity certificate （the form may be per-shipment, registration, or type approval depending on the product and current JSMO procedure）. The product must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz. There is no EU-style single CE self-declaration covering everything and no mandatory EU-Authorised-Representative role — instead the registered Jordanian importer is the responsible market-placement entity, and goods commonly enter via Aqaba. Retain test reports and the conformity certificate. Confirm the exact certificate route and accepted laboratory accreditation with JSMO.
summary.zh: 为将 LED 灯具投放约旦市场，出口商（通过在约旦注册的在地进口商）须备齐：（1）针对适用 JS/IEC 安全标准的检测证据（灯具 JS/IEC 60598-1；自镇流灯 JS/IEC 62560）；（2）EMC 发射证据（基于 CISPR 15）；（3）依 JSMO 标签方案的能效标签；（4）相关时的光生物评估（JS/IEC 62471）；（5）智能/无线产品的 TRC 型号核准。上述提交以取得 JSMO 合格证书（形式可为逐批、注册或型式核准，视产品及 JSMO 现行程序而定）。产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 标定。无欧盟式涵盖全部的单一 CE 自我声明，亦无强制欧盟授权代表角色——而是由在约旦注册的进口商作为负责的市场投放主体，货物通常经亚喀巴入境。保留检测报告及合格证书。请向 JSMO 确认确切证书路径及接受的实验室认可。
summary.zht: 為將 LED 燈具投放約旦市場，出口商（通過在約旦註冊的在地進口商）須備齊：（1）針對適用 JS/IEC 安全標準的檢測證據（燈具 JS/IEC 60598-1；自鎮流燈 JS/IEC 62560）；（2）EMC 發射證據（基於 CISPR 15）；（3）依 JSMO 標籤方案的能效標籤；（4）相關時的光生物評估（JS/IEC 62471）；（5）智能/無線產品的 TRC 型號核准。上述提交以取得 JSMO 合格證書（形式可為逐批、註冊或型式核准，視產品及 JSMO 現行程序而定）。產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 標定。無歐盟式涵蓋全部的單一 CE 自我聲明，亦無強制歐盟授權代表角色——而是由在約旦註冊的進口商作為負責的市場投放主體，貨物通常經亞喀巴入境。保留檢測報告及合格證書。請向 JSMO 確認確切證書路徑及接受的實驗室認可。

standards_or_laws: JSMO conformity certificate for regulated lighting (bundling JS/IEC safety, CISPR 15 EMC, energy label, JS/IEC 62471, and TRC where applicable)
Registered in-country Jordanian importer as market-placement entity (port of entry typically Aqaba)

summary.en: In China the primary mandatory mechanism for residential luminaires is CCC （China Compulsory Certification）, administered by CNCA and certified by bodies such as CQC. CCC is a mandatory third-party type-certification tied to GB standards. CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally need SRRC type approval. CCC certificates are issued against Chinese standards and are not recognised by JSMO for Jordanian market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的主要强制机制为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，并由 CQC 等机构认证。CCC 是与 GB 标准挂钩的强制性第三方型式认证。对非强制 CCC 范畴产品可申请 CQC 自愿性认证。带无线功能的灯具另需 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 证书依中国标准签发，不被 JSMO 用于约旦市场准入所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的主要強制機制為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，並由 CQC 等機構認證。CCC 是與 GB 標準掛鈎的強制性第三方型式認證。對非強制 CCC 範疇產品可申請 CQC 自願性認證。帶無線功能的燈具另需 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 證書依中國標準簽發，不被 JSMO 用於約旦市場准入所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both markets use a mandatory conformity scheme tied to national standards, but they are non-mutual and structurally different. Key gaps versus CN CCC: （1） Jordan requires a registered in-country importer as the market-placement entity （there is no EU-Authorised-Representative role, but the importer plays the responsible-entity part）; （2） JSMO does not accept CCC certificates or GB test reports — evidence must reference the JS/IEC standards and may need a laboratory accreditation accepted by JSMO （confirm ILAC MRA acceptance）; （3） the conformity certificate may be per-shipment, registration, or type approval depending on the product and procedure — unlike CN CCC's domestic type-certificate model; （4） voltage rating must suit Jordan's 230 V, 50 Hz （CN 220 V products need confirmation/testing at 230 V）; （5） smart products need TRC （Jordan） rather than SRRC （China）. The exporter must repackage existing GB/CCC evidence against the JS/IEC references and route everything through the Jordanian importer.
gap.zh: 两地均采用与本国标准挂钩的强制合格评定制度，但不互认且结构不同。相对中国 CCC 的主要差距：（1）约旦要求在地注册进口商作为市场投放主体（无欧盟授权代表角色，但进口商承担负责主体的部分）；（2）JSMO 不接受 CCC 证书或 GB 检测报告——证据须引用 JS/IEC 标准，并可能需 JSMO 接受的实验室认可（确认 ILAC MRA 接受度）；（3）合格证书可为逐批、注册或型式核准，视产品及程序而定——不同于中国 CCC 的国内型式证书模式；（4）电压标定须适配约旦 230 V、50 Hz（中国 220 V 产品需在 230 V 确认/检测）；（5）智能产品需约旦 TRC 而非中国 SRRC。出口商须将现有 GB/CCC 证据依 JS/IEC 引用重新打包，并经约旦进口商办理全部流程。
gap.zht: 兩地均採用與本國標準掛鈎的強制合格評定制度，但不互認且結構不同。相對中國 CCC 的主要差距：（1）約旦要求在地註冊進口商作為市場投放主體（無歐盟授權代表角色，但進口商承擔負責主體的部分）；（2）JSMO 不接受 CCC 證書或 GB 檢測報告——證據須引用 JS/IEC 標準，並可能需 JSMO 接受的實驗室認可（確認 ILAC MRA 接受度）；（3）合格證書可為逐批、註冊或型式核准，視產品及程序而定——不同於中國 CCC 的國內型式證書模式；（4）電壓標定須適配約旦 230 V、50 Hz（中國 220 V 產品需在 230 V 確認/檢測）；（5）智能產品需約旦 TRC 而非中國 SRRC。出口商須將現有 GB/CCC 證據依 JS/IEC 引用重新打包，並經約旦進口商辦理全部流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — JSMO conformity certificate (bundling safety, EMC, energy label, photobiological, and TRC where applicable) required before customs clearance; a registered in-country Jordanian importer is the market-placement entity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Jordanian market access for LED luminaires runs through a JSMO conformity certificate that bundles JS/IEC safety, CISPR 15 EMC, the energy label, photobiological assessment, and TRC approval for smart products, submitted by a registered in-country importer (entry typically via Aqaba). Unlike the EU there is no single CE self-declaration and no EU-Authorised-Representative role — the importer is the responsible entity. CCC and CE evidence are not accepted; GB/CCC test data must be repackaged against the JS/IEC references, and products rated for 230 V, 50 Hz. Confirm the exact certificate route and accepted lab accreditation with JSMO.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具进入约旦市场须通过 JSMO 合格证书办理，该证书捆绑 JS/IEC 安全、CISPR 15 EMC、能效标签、光生物评估及智能产品的 TRC 核准，由在地注册进口商提交（通常经亚喀巴入境）。与欧盟不同，无单一 CE 自我声明，亦无欧盟授权代表角色——进口商为负责主体。CCC 与 CE 证据不被接受；GB/CCC 检测数据须依 JS/IEC 引用重新打包，产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 标定。请向 JSMO 确认确切证书路径及接受的实验室认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具進入約旦市場須通過 JSMO 合格證書辦理，該證書捆綁 JS/IEC 安全、CISPR 15 EMC、能效標籤、光生物評估及智能產品的 TRC 核准，由在地註冊進口商提交（通常經亞喀巴入境）。與歐盟不同，無單一 CE 自我聲明，亦無歐盟授權代表角色——進口商為負責主體。CCC 與 CE 證據不被接受；GB/CCC 檢測數據須依 JS/IEC 引用重新打包，產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 標定。請向 JSMO 確認確切證書路徑及接受的實驗室認可。
